title: product_validations
description: Multi-variable validation checks expressed as math.js expressions. The expression should return truthy when the input is valid. severity='error' blocks BOM generation; severity='warning' surfaces a note but generates the BOM anyway.

expression.description: math.js expression returning boolean. Variables available: all product_variables in current context. Example: 'target_height_mm >= 300 && target_height_mm <= 2700'.
